arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are closely watching Hugo Ekitike’s potential move to Eintracht Frankfurt, as they stand to receive a percentage of the transfer fee. Newcastle have considered Ekitike as a potential replacement for Alexander Isak, with the club previously showing interest during his time at PSG, per CaughtOffside. arts.ttl: Liverpool Confident in Pursuit of Barcelona, PSG’s £150M-Rated Target From Newcastle

However, reports suggest PSG and other clubs may make a stronger push for him this summer.
